title: Hardest Core
description:
A mod for people who havent had a hard enough time in minecraft, but worry not because this mod here is pure concentrated pain and agony, so get ready for a terrible time and get ready to rage.


Good Luck.
body:
Have you ever wished that minecraft was harder? No? well too bad because with this mode you will be having a terrible time with pure concentrated pain. so get ready for Hardest Core.


Good Luck.
